qcSource: Author Test Cases - LoD and Annottaion cue.pdf

legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block (graceful when the LoD/Cue feature flag is off).
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires backend-seeded Display Criteria, CLP/Reader, Publish, persistence-after-reload, RTE toolbar, clipboard, cross-device, or a11y flows.
